title: Treasury Grants Selective Customs Waiver to Favored Importer

violations.source: Article XIV Section 3.2, Section 4.4, and Section 5.1
violations.summary: Treasury grants a politically connected importer of critical components a selective customs-duty waiver without lawful authorization. Article XIV forbids officers from collecting, waiving, redirecting, or selectively withholding taxes except as authorized by law, and bars revenue administration that creates arbitrary favoritism.

satisfied_duties.duty: void the unlawful selective customs-duty waiver and require lawful, nondiscriminatory collection
satisfied_duties.outcome: voided the selective customs-duty waiver and required Treasury to administer the duty law on equal terms
satisfied_duties.source: Article XIV Section 3.2, Section 4.4, and Section 5.1

ai_summary.primary_violation: Treasury grants a politically connected importer of critical components a selective customs-duty waiver without lawful authorization. Article XIV forbids officers from collecting, waiving, redirecting, or selectively withholding taxes except as authorized by law, and bars revenue administration that creates arbitrary favoritism.
ai_summary.recommended_focus: review bottlenecks, violations, and unresolved duties
